Roadmap: Phase 1: Basics of IT: Networking (IP, DNS, OSI Model) and Linux command line basics.
Phase 2: Security fundamentals: CIA Triad, Basic Cryptography, and common threats (Phishing, Malware).
Phase 3: Tools & Practice: practice on these platforms: Wireshark, Nmap, and Capture The Flag (CTF).
Phase 4: Advanced Exploitation & Lab Setup: VulnHub, HackTheBox, and local VM environments.
Phase 5: Professional Certifications: eJPT, CompTIA Security+, and real-world projects.
